description: Curated high-impact CVEs for common stacks. Update when new critical CVEs drop.

Next.js.summary: Middleware bypass / path traversal. Verify patch applied.
SSRF via server-side fetch. Update to patched version.

React.summary: React2Shell-style RCE in dev mode / SSR. Ensure production build and patch.

Express.summary: ReDoS in qs parser. Upgrade to 4.17.3+ or 4.18+.

Django.summary: Potential DoS. Update to patched release.

WordPress.summary: Auth bypass / privilege escalation. Update immediately.
